NAVAREA 112/24

 1. ROCKET LAUNCHING SCHEDULED 0800 TO 1430 UTC DAILY FROM 02 TO 09 SEP.
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREA:
 1. 70-58.8N 012-37.4E
 2. 70-41.4N 013-32.2E
 3. 70-22.7N 012-30.0E
 4. 70-43.1N 011-31.9E

 2. CANCEL THIS WARNING 09 SEP  1430 UTC
